title: erythranthe latidens
intro: Erythranthe latidens, also known as California beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Erythranthe latidens can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
